Table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

Card of table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

Name

FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

Code

FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

TABLE having users associated with each group.

 

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select md5(ATLAN_USERNAME_BK,VALID_FROM) DIM_ATLAN_USER_KEY,

md5(ATLAN_TECHNICAL_GROUP_NAME_BK,VALID_FROM) DIM_ATLAN_GROUP_KEY

FROM

(

select username as ATLAN_USERNAME_BK,

group_name as ATLAN_TECHNICAL_GROUP_NAME_BK

from

(

SELECT DISTINCT

USERNAME,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS GROUP_NAME

FROM (

SELECT

USERNAME,

REPLACE(GROUPS, '\n', ',') AS GROUPS_REPLACED

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT USERNAME, GROUPS

FROM T_ATLAN_ADMIN_EXPORT_USERS

WHERE GROUPS IS NOT NULL

)

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.GROUPS_REPLACED, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY USERNAME, GROUP_NAME))


Check constraint name of the table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

CKT_FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT


Server validation rule of the table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT

drop table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT (
DIM_USER_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_USER_GROUP_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT primary key (DIM_USER_GROUP_KEY, DIM_USER_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT set comment = 'Factless Fact table created to show the groups an Atlan user belongs';

comment on column FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_USER_KEY is
'Dimension key identifying each unique user';

comment on column FACT_USER_GROUP_ASSIGNMENT.DIM_USER_GROUP_KEY is
'Dimension key identifying each unique group';
